title: Hauler VI
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Hauler VI''''' was a [[Censian-class transport|''Censian''-class transport]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The Alliance used it to transport SpecForce Marines of its army.<ref name="a">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

During a particular run, the ''Hauler VI'' hosted no less than 400 marines. It was then targeted by a crew of 48 pirates from the criminal [[Fivaran Organization]], who were unaware of its cargo. Two of the pirates, the [[Venithon Twins]], discovered the cargo but, instead of warning their partners, they escaped. The other pirates began a raid on the ''Hauler'' and were eventually killed or captured. This skirmish led to the Venithon Twins losing the favor of the Fivaran Organization.<ref name="a" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
